title: Operation Frequent Wind
strengths: Concise operational summary with widely repeated totals for the final helicopter evacuation.
limitations: Evacuee counts are mixed by status on the American side.
notes: Primary open source for the final helicopter evacuation window.

citation_short: Wikipedia, Bombing of Tan Son Nhut Air Base
title: Bombing of Tan Son Nhut Air Base
geographic_scope: Tan Son Nhut Air Base / DAO complex
strengths: Good for precise timing of the transition from fixed-wing to helicopter evacuation.
limitations: Damage and casualty reporting is uneven across sides.

title: The Final Collapse
author_or_org: U.S. Army Center of Military History
strengths: Official operational narrative focused on the final collapse.
notes: Used mainly to discipline the bundle's temporal scope.

title: Vietnam from Cease-Fire to Capitulation
author_or_org: U.S. Army Center of Military History
pages_or_sections: Saigon chapter and Tan Son Nhut context
strengths: Detailed official chronology for the final campaign endgame.
limitations: Broader than the final urban collapse window and not a civilian death-count source.
notes: Used to keep the bundle narrowly attached to the last urban days.
